metadata.description: Free, open-source Claude Skills for local government work. TRAIGA-aware, NIST AI RMF aligned. Maintained by WhitegloveAI.

plugins.name: council-ops
plugins.description: City council operations: agendas, minutes, council packets, resolutions, decision memos, ordinance tracking, public comment summarization.

plugins.name: clerk
plugins.description: City clerk workflows: TPIA/PIA responses, records retention, open meetings compliance, election notices, proclamations, public notices.

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: Municipal finance: budget narratives, variance analysis, grant applications, RFPs, transparency reports, audit responses, financial disclosures.

plugins.name: hr
plugins.description: Local government HR: job descriptions, policy analysis, onboarding packets, employee handbooks, performance evaluations, ADA accommodations.

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: Planning and development services: zoning narratives, permit reviews, site plan summaries, public hearing notices, variance analyses, staff reports.

plugins.name: public-works
plugins.description: Public works operations: work order summaries, maintenance log analysis, capital improvement plans, service request classification, infrastructure reports.

plugins.name: it
plugins.description: Local government IT: policy drafting, security incident classification, vendor risk questionnaires, AI governance checklists, system-of-record mapping.

plugins.name: legal
plugins.description: City attorney work: contract redline summaries, ordinance impact analyses, TPIA legal review, litigation summaries, interlocal agreement drafts.

plugins.name: public-safety
plugins.description: Police, fire, EMS, emergency management: incident narrative cleanup, training bulletins, after-action reports, community engagement, emergency comms.

plugins.name: communications
plugins.description: Public information office: press releases, citizen newsletters, municipal-style social media, talking points, crisis communications templates.

plugins.name: economic-development
plugins.description: Economic development: incentive proposals, site selection responses, business retention survey analysis, annual report narratives.

plugins.name: parks-recreation
plugins.description: Parks and recreation: program flyers, volunteer recognition, facility rental responses, sponsorship proposals.

plugins.name: library
plugins.description: Public library staff: program descriptions, collection development justifications, community partnership proposals.
